Primary Goals: Drive transformation | Maximize ROI | Ensure compliance | Build scalable ops | Strategic partnerships
Key Pain Points: Vendor proliferation | ROI measurement | Cybersecurity threats | Finding trusted partners | Innovation/stability balance
Success Metrics: EBITDA improvement | Cost reduction % | Customer retention | Employee productivity
Communication Preferences: Executive summaries | ROI proposals | In-person meetings | Quarterly reviews
Information Sources: Peer CEO networks | Gartner/Forrester | Board advisors | WSJ/HBR
Primary INT Services: Managed IT | Information Security | Operations Consulting | Technology Strategy

Relationship Map: REPORTS TO: Board | MANAGES: C-suite team | INFLUENCES: Strategy

Title: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO)
Primary Goals: SOC 2/ISO 27001 compliance | Minimize cyber risk | Security culture | Zero-trust architecture | Demonstrate ROI
Key Pain Points: Limited budget/headcount | Evolving threats | Audit prep time (6-8 wks) | Employee awareness gaps | Vendor assessments
Success Metrics: Zero breaches | MTTD <15min | Clean audits | Audit prep 2-3 weeks
Communication Preferences: Technical docs | Risk matrices | Compliance dashboards | Monthly reviews
Information Sources: SANS | (ISC)² | RSA/Black Hat | Local CISO chapters
Primary INT Services: Information Security | SOC 2/ISO 27001 audit | Security awareness | Vulnerability assessments
AI Tool Recommendations: PRIMARY: Claude Team ($30/user, 3-5 seats) for compliance docs
Relationship Map: REPORTS TO: CEO/CIO/CFO | MANAGES: Security team | COLLAB: IT/Ops/Legal
